headline: Fees Are Rising Much Faster Than Gig Worker Pay—Here Are The Top-Paying Apps
summary: A new Gridwise Analytics report reveals what drivers on Uber, DoorDash, Spark, and other platforms earned per hour in 2025, and how rising fares changed the math for everyone.

headline: Uber: I've Been Bullish For Years - Not Anymore
summary: Uber (UBER) downgrade: slowing revenue growth, non-recurring margin gains, AV competition risk, and limited upside at ~27x. Read more macro analysis here.
